nation: Mosquito, Grizzly Bear's Head, Lean Man First Nation
one_time_description: Equity change in corporations - large gain recognized on investment in government business enterprises (primarily MGBHLM Economic Development Company LP)
economic_notes: First Nation has four government business enterprises: Mosquito Daycare Centre Inc., MGBHLM TLE Makah Holding Corp, MGBHLM Economic Development Company LP (99.999%), and MGBHLM Economic Development Company Ltd (0.001%). Contributions of $1,248,000 made to limited partnership during the year. Treaty Land Entitlement (TLE) Trust excluded from consolidation.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020 not 2024. Province is Saskatchewan. Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis; TLE Trust excluded from consolidation. Large equity gain of $923,367 on investment in corporations (mainly new LP investment). Two significant claims-related loans with Royal Bank totaling ~$3.37M for Treaty 6 Benefits and Surrender Claim settlement financing. Annuity accounts decreased from $2.35M to $1.04M suggesting distributions made. Maurice Law accounts payable of $815,005 related to settlement claims legal fees. Deferred revenue includes Treaty Annuity settlement funds of $1,079,567. Audit signed January 18, 2021 with December 17, 2020 management signature - significant delay. Portfolio investment of $50,000 in Avord Towers held through Battleford Tribal Council with noted inability to verify existence or value.
